fingerprint.not-centered: Center your finger and try again
fingerprint.ready: Place your finger on the reader
fingerprint.remove-and-retry: Remove your finger and try again
fingerprint.swipe-too-short: Swipe was too short, try again

confirm.clear-desc: Choose whether pinned items should be kept.
confirm.clear-desc-all-pinned: Every entry is pinned. Use Clear everything to remove them all.
confirm.clear-desc-no-pinned: This removes every entry from clipboard history.
confirm.delete-desc: This removes the selected item from clipboard history.

empty.history-message: No entries in the clipboard history.
empty.no-matches-message: No entries match the current filter.

audio.no-application-audio-body: No application playback streams are currently available.
audio.no-input-devices-body: No recording sources are currently available.
audio.no-output-devices-body: No playback sinks are currently available.

bluetooth.no-devices: No devices found. Start scanning to discover nearby Bluetooth devices.

pairing-detail.confirm: Confirm that this code matches the one shown on the device:
pairing-detail.display-passkey: Enter this code on the device:
pairing-detail.display-pin: Enter this PIN on the device:
pairing-detail.passkey: Enter the passkey shown on the device:
pairing-detail.pin-code: Enter the PIN shown on the device:

bluetooth.rfkill-blocked: Bluetooth is blocked by the system. Turn it on to clear the block.

media.start-playback: Start playback in an MPRIS app

network.unavailable-detail: Install and enable NetworkManager to manage networks from here.

screen-time.disabled: Screen time tracking is off. Enable it in Settings to record per-app usage.
screen-time.empty: No app usage recorded yet. Focus a window to start tracking.

errors.parse-ip-geolocation: Could not parse IP geolocation response

lockscreen.ready: Type your password and press Enter.

internal.calendar-google-connect-browser-failed: No browser opener could be launched for Google authorization. Check your default browser or xdg-open setup.
internal.calendar-google-connect-expired: Google authorization expired before sign-in finished. Start the connection again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-missing-account: No configured Google calendar account matched "{account}".
internal.calendar-google-connect-rate-limited: Google authorization is temporarily rate limited. Wait a bit, then try again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-result-failed: Could not finish Google authorization. Start the connection again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-start-failed: Could not start Google authorization. Check your network connection and try again.
internal.calendar-google-connect-start-http: Could not start Google authorization. The OAuth broker returned HTTP {status}.
internal.calendar-google-connect-timeout: Google authorization timed out. Start the connection again when you are ready to sign in.
internal.desktop-widgets-editor-enabled: Desktop widget editor is on. Switch to an empty workspace to see the editor overlay.
internal.greeter-sync-success: Appearance synced. Changes apply on the next login screen.
internal.keybind-invalid-modifier: This shortcut accepts a single key without modifiers.
internal.keybind-invalid-printable: Printable keys (letters, numbers, symbols) require a modifier such as Ctrl or Alt.
internal.keybind-invalid-super: The Super/Windows key cannot be used in shell keybinds.
internal.lockscreen-widgets-editor-blocked-locked: Unlock the session before editing lockscreen widgets.
internal.lockscreen-widgets-editor-enabled: Lockscreen widget editor is on. Arrange widgets on the preview overlay, then lock the session to verify the layout.
internal.wallpaper-palette-export-success: Saved "{name}" and switched palette source to custom.

errors.lock-body: The session lock protocol is not available.

calendar-accounts.invalid: Check the highlighted calendar account fields.
calendar-accounts.password-keep-placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password
calendar-accounts.password-save-error: Could not save calendar account password.

bar.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created bar will be removed from settings.toml.

monitor-override.delete-confirm-desc: This GUI-created monitor override will be removed from settings.toml.
monitor-override.label: Monitor: {name}

editor.description: Arrange widgets across the bar lanes

group.border-description: Capsule outline color role; leave on Default for no outline
group.fill-description: Capsule background color role; fixed hex colors are also supported
group.foreground-description: Icon and label color role for widgets in this group

instance.delete-confirm-desc: This named widget will be removed from every bar and its settings discarded.
instance.id-description: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens only. No spaces; must be unique.

lanes.empty-hint: Add a widget to populate this lane.

raw.description: Unsupported keys preserved from this widget config.

settings.empty: No settings match the current filters.

errors.avatar-accounts: Could not update the system account avatar.

errors.avatar-write: Could not prepare the avatar image for saving.
errors.batch-write: Some settings could not be saved.
errors.export-wallpaper-palette: Could not save the wallpaper palette as a custom palette.

export-config.full-effective-description: Exports every active setting, including built-in defaults. Useful for inspection or sharing a snapshot, but pins current defaults explicitly.
export-config.merged-user-description: Combines config files and GUI overrides into one TOML file. Built-in defaults stay implicit.

border.description: Color role for the bar outline; fixed hex colors are also supported

content-padding.description: Padding inside the bar content area

corner-top-left.description: Top left corner radius for the bar; negative values carve a concave corner when this corner faces away from the screen edge

ends-margin.description: Inset from each end of the bar along its main axis

panel-overlap.description: Pixels an attached panel overlaps the bar edge to hide the seam (adjust if you see a line or gap)

reserve-space.description: Push windows away from the bar edge

shadow.description: Cast the global surface shadow from the bar

screenshot-save-to-file.description: Write screenshots as PNG files to the output directory
screenshot-save-to-file.label: Save to File

show-location.description: Show location name in weather widgets
show-location.label: Show Location

sync-greeter.description: Copy the current wallpaper and colors to Noctalia Greeter (requires administrator approval)
sync-greeter.label: Noctalia Greeter

telemetry.description: Sends a small anonymous startup ping with version, OS, compositor, monitor resolutions, RAM, and UI scale
telemetry.label: Anonymous Startup Ping

time-format.description: Default time format for shell UI without its own setting

battery-device-warning-threshold.description: Override the battery warning threshold for this device. Set 0 to disable warnings for this device.
battery-device-warning-threshold.label: {device} Warning Threshold

battery-warning-threshold.description: System battery percentage at or below which the shell sends a low-battery notification and battery widgets use their warning color. Set 0 to disable.
battery-warning-threshold.label: Battery Warning Threshold

builtin-ids.description: Toggle bundled app templates to render on each theme change
builtin-ids.label: Built-In Templates

community-ids.description: Toggle cached community templates to render on each theme change

community-ids.label: Community Templates

enable-builtins.description: Use the bundled catalog of theme templates for apps
enable-builtins.label: Enable Built-In Templates

enable-community-templates.description: Download and apply templates from the community catalog
enable-community-templates.label: Enable Community Templates

automation.description: Cycle wallpapers automatically on a timer
automation.label: Automatic Rotation

directory-dark.description: Wallpaper folder used in dark theme mode
directory-dark.label: Dark Mode Directory

directory-light.description: Wallpaper folder used in light theme mode
directory-light.label: Light Mode Directory

edge-smoothness.description: Feathering of transition edges between wallpapers
edge-smoothness.label: Edge Smoothness

fill-color.description: Solid color shown behind image in uncovered areas
fill-color.label: Fill Color

per-monitor-directories.description: Use separate wallpaper folders for each monitor
per-monitor-directories.label: Per-Monitor Directories

transition-duration.description: Length of the wallpaper change animation in milliseconds
transition-duration.label: Transition Duration

transition-on-startup.description: Play a transition when the shell first shows a wallpaper
transition-on-startup.label: Animate on Startup

transitions.description: Effects available when changing wallpaper (one is picked at random per change)
transitions.label: Transition Effects

session-actions.command-placeholder: Optional bash command, leave empty for built-in behavior

active-color.description: Color used for active privacy indicators; fixed hex colors are also supported
active-color.label: Active Color

active-opacity.description: Opacity of the icon for the active (focused) window.
active-opacity.label: Active Icon Opacity

album-art-only.description: Show only the circular album artwork without the track title
album-art-only.label: Album Art Only

anchor.description: Pin this widget as the center alignment anchor
anchor.label: Anchor

cam-filter-regex.description: Regular expression for camera process names to ignore
cam-filter-regex.label: Camera Filter Regex

capsule.description: Draw a capsule behind this widget
capsule.label: Capsule

capsule-border.description: Color role for the capsule outline; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-border.label: Capsule Border

capsule-fill.description: Color role for the capsule background; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-fill.label: Capsule Fill

capsule-foreground.description: Color role for content inside the capsule; fixed hex colors are also supported
capsule-foreground.label: Capsule Foreground

capsule-radius.description: Corner radius for this widget capsule; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners
capsule-radius.label: Capsule Radius
capsule-radius.taskbar-description: Corner radius for the widget capsule, workspace disc indicators, and workspace group capsules; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners
capsule-radius.workspaces-description: Corner radius for this widget capsule and workspace pills; leave blank for automatic pill shape, or set 0 for square corners

centered.description: Center visualizer bars instead of aligning them to the edge
centered.label: Centered

color.description: Color role for this widget's icon and label; fixed hex colors are also supported
color.label: Color

color-1.description: First gradient color in the visualizer
color-1.label: Color One

color-2.description: Second gradient color in the visualizer
color-2.label: Color Two

command.description: Shell command run when left-clicking this button
command.label: Left Click Command

custom-image.description: Path to a custom image. Leave empty to use the icon glyph.
custom-image.label: Custom image

custom-image-colorize.description: Tint the custom image with the widget Icon Color setting
custom-image-colorize.label: Colorize custom image

custom-labels.description: Map keyboard layout names to custom labels
custom-labels.label: Custom Labels

cycle-command.description: Command run when cycling keyboard layouts
cycle-command.label: Cycle Command

detached-panel.description: Open the drawer as a floating panel with its own background instead of merging with the bar
detached-panel.label: Detached Panel

display.active-window-description: Icon, title, or both on horizontal bars. Vertical bars stay icon-only.

display-mode.label: Display Mode

drawer.description: Show a tray button in the bar and open items in a panel
drawer.label: Use Drawer Panel

drawer-columns.description: Number of tray icons per row in the drawer panel
drawer-columns.label: Drawer Columns

empty-color.description: Color role used for empty workspaces; fixed hex colors are also supported
empty-color.label: Empty Color

focused-color.description: Color role used for the focused workspace; fixed hex colors are also supported
focused-color.label: Focused Color

font-family.description: Typeface for this widget; leave empty to inherit the bar font
font-family.label: Font Family

font-weight.description: Default inherits the bar font weight
font-weight.label: Font Weight

glyph.label: Glyph
glyph.sysmon-description: Custom icon glyph. Leave empty to use the icon for the selected stat.

group-by-workspace.description: Group taskbar icons into workspace capsules when compositor data is available
group-by-workspace.label: Group by Workspace

group-single-icon-per-app.description: When grouping by workspace, collapse multiple windows from the same app into one icon with a count badge.

hide-empty-workspaces.description: When grouping by workspace, omit capsules that have no running windows in the taskbar list.
hide-empty-workspaces.label: Hide Empty Workspaces

hide-inactive.description: Hide inactive privacy icons and hide the widget when nothing is active

hide-when-empty.description: Hide workspace pills when there are no open windows
hide-when-empty.label: Hide When Empty
hide-when-empty.workspaces-description: Hide workspace pills that have no open windows

hide-when-full.description: Hide the battery widget when fully charged
hide-when-full.label: Hide When Full

hide-when-no-connected-device.description: Hide the bluetooth widget when no device is connected
hide-when-no-connected-device.label: Hide When No Connected Device

hide-when-no-media.description: Hide the media widget when no MPRIS player is active
hide-when-no-media.label: Hide When No Media

hide-when-no-unread.description: Hide the notifications widget when there are no unread notifications
hide-when-no-unread.label: Hide When No New

hide-when-off.description: Hide the lock key indicator when inactive
hide-when-off.label: Hide When Off

hide-when-plugged.description: Hide the battery widget while connected to AC power
hide-when-plugged.label: Hide When Plugged In

hide-when-single-layout.description: Hide the keyboard layout widget unless more than one layout is configured
hide-when-single-layout.label: Hide When Single Layout

highlight-color.description: Color reached at or above the critical threshold
highlight-color.label: Highlight Color

hot-reload.description: Reload the scripted widget when its source changes
hot-reload.label: Hot Reload

icon-color.description: Overrides the widget color for icons only; fixed hex colors are also supported
icon-color.label: Icon Color

icon-spacing.description: Spacing between privacy indicator icons in pixels
icon-spacing.label: Icon Spacing

inactive-color.description: Color used for inactive privacy indicators; fixed hex colors are also supported
inactive-color.label: Inactive Color

inactive-opacity.description: Opacity of icons for inactive (unfocused) windows.
inactive-opacity.label: Inactive Icon Opacity

interface.description: Network interface to monitor; leave empty to use the total across all interfaces
interface.label: Interface

label.description: Optional static text shown on this button
label.label: Label

label-min-width.description: Minimum label width in pixels to prevent resizing
label-min-width.label: Label Min Width

labels-only-when-occupied.description: Hide workspace labels on empty, inactive workspaces
labels-only-when-occupied.label: Labels Only When Occupied
labels-only-when-occupied.workspaces-description: Show workspace id or name labels on workspaces with open windows and on the active workspace even when it is empty; other empty tags stay unlabeled

match-adjacent-spacing.description: Widen gaps between inline tray icons to match the visual spacing of neighboring bar widgets (includes capsule padding)
match-adjacent-spacing.label: Match Adjacent Widget Spacing

max-label-chars.description: Maximum number of characters to show for workspace names
max-label-chars.label: Max Label Characters
max-label-chars.workspaces-description: Maximum characters for workspace name labels

mic-filter-regex.description: Regular expression for microphone app names to ignore
mic-filter-regex.label: Microphone Filter Regex

middle-command.description: Shell command run when middle-clicking this button. When set, middle-click opens this command instead of widget settings.
middle-command.label: Middle Click Command

minimal.description: Show workspace id or name labels only, without animated pills
minimal.label: Minimal Style
minimal.workspaces-description: Text-only workspace labels without pill backgrounds or slide animation

mirrored.description: Mirror the visualizer around its center
mirrored.label: Mirrored

occupied-color.description: Color role used for occupied workspaces; fixed hex colors are also supported
occupied-color.label: Occupied Color

pill-scale.description: Adjust the scale of workspace pills
pill-scale.label: Pill Scale
pill-scale.workspaces-description: Adjust the scale of workspace pills

pinned.description: Tray item ids that stay visible in the bar when drawer mode is enabled
pinned.label: Pinned Items

primary-click.description: Action performed when left-clicking the bar button
primary-click.label: Primary click

right-command.description: Shell command run when right-clicking this button
right-command.label: Right Click Command

scale.description: Scale this widget relative to the bar content scale
scale.label: Scale

scope.description: Run one script runtime per live widget placement, or share one runtime across bars with the same widget id
scope.label: Runtime Scope

scroll-down-command.description: Shell command run when scrolling down over this button
scroll-down-command.label: Scroll Down Command

scroll-step.description: Percentage change applied on each mouse wheel step
scroll-step.label: Scroll Step

scroll-up-command.description: Shell command run when scrolling up over this button
scroll-up-command.label: Scroll Up Command

show-active-indicator.description: Show a small dot below the active window icon in the taskbar.
show-active-indicator.label: Active Window Indicator

show-all-outputs.description: Include windows from every display on this widget.
show-all-outputs.label: Show All Monitors

show-empty-label.description: Show placeholder text when no window is focused instead of hiding the widget
show-empty-label.label: Show Empty Label

show-label.description: Show text next to the icon
show-label.label: Show Label

show-when-idle.description: Keep the visualizer visible even when no media is playing
show-when-idle.label: Show When Idle

show-window-title.description: Show the window title next to its icon (only on horizontal bars)
show-window-title.label: Show Window Title

show-workspace-label.description: Show the small workspace tag on grouped taskbar capsules. Turn off for icon-only groups.
show-workspace-label.label: Workspace Capsule Label

taskbar-max-width.description: Total width budget in pixels; window titles shrink to fit and hide when too narrow
taskbar-max-width.label: Taskbar Max Width

title-scroll.description: When the widget title should scroll
title-scroll.label: Title Scroll

tooltip.description: Tooltip shown when hovering this button
tooltip.label: Tooltip

type.description: Built-in widget type for this named widget
type.label: Type

vertical-format.description: Optional format used on vertical bars
vertical-format.label: Vertical Format

warning-color.description: Color applied when charge is at or below the System battery warning threshold
warning-color.label: Warning Color

window-title-max-width.description: Maximum width in pixels for window titles
window-title-max-width.label: Window Title Max Width

workspace-group-capsule.description: Draw the background and border around each grouped workspace. Turn off to keep icon grouping and workspace disc labels only.
workspace-group-capsule.label: Workspace Group Capsule

workspace-label-placement.description: Corner, centered on the edge, or inside the pill.
